ddls:
CREATE TABLE "district_health_boards" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the District Health Board */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the DHB operates */,
  "dhb_email" TEXT /* Email address of the DHB */,
  "dhb_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the DHB */,
  "dhb_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the DHB office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_range" TEXT /* Age range for the group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination type */,
  "vaccination_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination type */,
  "vaccination_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vaccination type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination statistic */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals at least partially vaccinated */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals fully vaccinated */,
  "eligible_for_booster" INTEGER /* Number of individuals eligible for booster */,
  "booster_received" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who received booster */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the demographic group */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination statistics were reported */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the vaccination data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booster_eligibility" (
  "eligibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booster eligibility criteria */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility for booster shots */,
  "eligibility_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the eligibility criteria */,
  "eligibility_end_date" TEXT /* End date for the eligibility criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eligibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booster_administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booster administration record */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination statistic */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date when the booster was administered */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of vaccination received (e.g., Booster) */,
  "administration_method" TEXT /* Method used to administer the booster shot */,
  "administration_location" TEXT /* Location where the booster was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booster_administration_vaccination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("vaccination_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booster_administration_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES vaccination_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count in the demographic */,
  "population_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "population_date" TEXT /* Date when the population data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the vaccination campaign */,
  "campaign_manager" TEXT /* Name of the person managing the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_outreach" (
  "outreach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outreach effort */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "outreach_method" TEXT /* Method of outreach (e.g., Social media, Community events) */,
  "outreach_date" TEXT /* Date of the outreach effort */,
  "reach_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals reached */,
  "outreach_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the outreach effort */,
  "outreach_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff involved in the outreach effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outreach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_outreach_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact measurement */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "impact_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to measure impact (e.g., Increase in vaccination rate) */,
  "impact_value" REAL /* Value of the impact measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was measured */,
  "impact_confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the impact measurement */,
  "impact_margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the impact measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_impact_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., Unauthorized access attempt) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the security event */,
  "event_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution status of the security event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
